title: Accurate Identification of DNA Replication Origin by Fusing Epigenomics and Chromatin Interaction Information.
author: Dao FY Lv H Fullwood MJ Lin H
content: S-EPMC9667886 PMC9667886 Accurate Identification of DNA Replication Origin by Fusing Epigenomics and Chromatin Interaction Information.
